headline: Meta Joins OCI Group As AI Links And Valuation Draw Investor Focus
summary: Meta Platforms joined AMD, Broadcom, Microsoft, NVIDIA and OpenAI to form the Optical Compute Interconnect (OCI) MSA, an industry group focused on open optical links for AI infrastructure. The OCI MSA aims to create an open, multi vendor specification for high performance, power efficient optical interconnects used in large scale AI clusters. This move positions Meta as an active participant in setting technical standards that could influence how future AI data centers are built and...

headline: TSMC Stock (TSM) Wilts as Iranian Attacks Batter Helium Supply and Threaten Chip Production
summary: Major semiconductor stock TSMC (TSM) was lower today on fears that production will soon be hit by a lack of helium because of the Iran war. AI stock Nvidia (NVDA) and EV maker Tesla (TSLA) could also soon be in the firing line because of the rapid hike in helium prices. The recent attacks on energy facilities in the Gulf States by Iran following the outbreak of war with the U.S. and Israel have seen gas and oil prices spike higher. Helium is Pivotal in Semiconductor Production But the gas supply

headline: Broadcom Targets Quantum Safe Infrastructure With Silicon Level Encryption Rollout
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) has introduced what it calls the first quantum safe, in flight network encryption solution embedded directly at the silicon level. The company is rolling this out alongside support for new post quantum cryptography standards and tighter alignment with regulatory frameworks such as CNSA 2.0, NIS2, and DORA. Through its Emulex SecureHBA and Emulex SAN Manager 3.0, now integrated with Everpure’s FlashArray, Broadcom is extending PCI/DSS compliant storage security across...

headline: JP Morgan’s Dividend Leaders ETF Sounds Good, But The Yield Underwhelms
summary: JPMorgan Dividend Leaders ETF (NYSEARCA:JDIV) launched in September 2024 with an appealing premise: a curated portfolio of global dividend leaders. The name implies income. The reality is a 1.59% yield at a time when the 10-year Treasury sits at 4.20%. That gap is hard to ignore for income-focused investors. Metric Value Dividend Yield 1.59% Net ...
